name: plausible-ba
description: Institutional-grade Business Analysis skills for Claude. Methodology-grade outputs grounded in BABOK and real delivery experience. Every skill produces a professional XLSX artefact — not a chat response.
author: PlausibleBA

plugins.name: ba-capability-mapping
plugins.description: BABOK-grounded Business Capability Map. MECE 4-level hierarchy, Execution/Governance split, validated XLSX artefact.

plugins.name: ba-concept-model
plugins.description: Business Object Taxonomy. Names and classifies core business concepts, defines lifecycle and relationships, cross-validates Capability Map coverage.

plugins.name: ba-value-streams
plugins.description: Value Stream Analysis. Maps staged delivery of value to recipients, orchestrates capabilities into sequences, surfaces unused capabilities and gaps.
